title: quercus humilis f. globulosa
intro: Quercus humilis f. globulosa, also known as the dwarf scrub oak, is a subspecies of the Quercus humilis plant, characterized by its compact and shrub-like appearance. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Quercus humilis f. globulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms for therapeutic purposes.
